name: iFlow Plugin
description: Orchestrate iFlow sessions as managed background processes from any OpenClaw channel.

agentChannels.description: Map of workspace directories to notification channels

maxAutoResponds.description: Max consecutive auto-responds before requiring user input

skipSafetyChecks.description: Skip pre-launch safety checks (for dev/testing only)

iflowTimeout.description: Default iFlow session timeout in milliseconds

permissionMode.description: Default permission mode for iFlow sessions
